description_long: This is a large, modern cargo or transport airplane with a robust fuselage and a high-mounted, swept wing configuration. The aircraft features four prominent turbofan engines mounted under the wings, indicating significant thrust capability for heavy loads. The tail section is equipped with a conventional vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer, forming a classic T-tail design. The cockpit is positioned at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows suggesting a multi-seat, enclosed arrangement. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with main gear under the wings and a nose gear under the cockpit. The exterior is primarily a dark gray or black color, with some lighter gray visible on the wings and tail surfaces.
description: A large, dark gray cargo airplane with four underwing turbofan engines, high-mounted swept wings, and a T-tail. The forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear are clearly visible.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, high-mounted swept wings, and two visible underwing engines.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the wingspan, wing sweep, and the T-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the tail and two engines visible.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the four turbofan engines, cockpit windows, and the full width of the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional T-tail with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows.
